item.name: Monowheel S1 Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be electrope. Placing it near your monowheel S1 will magically bring the vehicle to life.

mount.name: Monowheel S1
mount.action: Summon forth your monowheel S1, a bold vehicle fit for a champion of the Arcadion.
mount.description: A prize Ascension Arcadia bestows upon its champions, this unique one-wheeled vehicle employs an advanced stability system that allows it to traverse any and all terrain. Owing to its complex controls, however, it takes considerable practice to become a competent rider.
mount.tooltip:
Without further ado, let us
set the wheels in motion!
- Lady Luck
